description: YOLO Gap 負樣本基線測試配置 — 用正常作業影片測 Moondream 的 False Positive 率

query_checks.name: worker_visible
query_checks.prompt: Is there any visible worker or person in this frame? Answer yes or no first, then explain briefly.

query_checks.name: smoking_visible
query_checks.prompt: Is any visible person smoking or holding a cigarette in this frame? Answer yes or no first, then explain briefly.

query_checks.name: abnormal_behavior
query_checks.prompt: Does this frame show any unsafe, abnormal, or suspicious worker behavior? Answer yes or no first, then explain briefly.

query_checks.name: person_falling
query_checks.prompt: Does anyone appear to be lying on the ground, collapsed, falling, or in need of help? Answer yes or no first, then explain briefly.

query_checks.name: missing_helmet
query_checks.prompt: Is any visible person not wearing a safety helmet or hard hat? Answer yes or no first, then explain briefly.

query_checks.name: missing_face_mask
query_checks.prompt: Is any visible worker missing a face mask or respirator while working? Answer yes or no first, then explain briefly.

query_checks.name: wheel_chock_present
query_checks.prompt: Is there a wheel chock or tire stopper visible near a vehicle wheel? Answer yes or no first, then explain briefly.

query_checks.name: scene_summary
query_checks.prompt: Briefly describe the worker, PPE, vehicle, and safety-relevant objects visible in this frame.

sampling.description: 每 5 秒抽一幀，4 支影片約 7.5 分鐘 → 預計約 90 幀
